title: Spaghetti Carbonara
description: Classic Italian pasta with eggs, cheese, pancetta and black pepper.

title: Chicken Tikka Masala
description: Tender chicken in a rich, creamy tomato-based spiced sauce.

title: Avocado Toast
description: Toasted sourdough topped with smashed avocado, chili flakes and a poached egg.

title: Beef Tacos
description: Crispy taco shells filled with seasoned ground beef, salsa and sour cream.

title: Margherita Pizza
description: Thin crust pizza with tomato sauce, fresh mozzarella and basil.

title: Greek Salad
description: Fresh cucumber, tomato, olives and feta cheese with olive oil dressing.

title: Butter Chicken
description: Slow-cooked chicken in a mild, buttery tomato and cream sauce.

title: French Onion Soup
description: Slow-caramelized onion soup topped with a crusty crouton and melted gruyère.

title: Pad Thai
description: Stir-fried rice noodles with shrimp, peanuts, bean sprouts and lime.

title: Blueberry Pancakes
description: Fluffy buttermilk pancakes loaded with fresh blueberries and maple syrup.

title: Beef Ramen
description: Rich tonkotsu-style broth with tender beef slices, soft-boiled egg and noodles.

title: Shakshuka
description: Eggs poached in a spiced tomato and pepper sauce, served with crusty bread.

description: Slow-cooked smoky pulled pork piled on a brioche bun with coleslaw.

description: Creamy Arborio rice with wild mushrooms, white wine and parmesan.

title: Fish and Chips
description: Beer-battered cod with thick-cut fries, mushy peas and tartar sauce.

title: Falafel Wrap
description: Crispy chickpea falafel with hummus, pickled vegetables and tahini in a flatbread.

title: BBQ Ribs
description: Fall-off-the-bone pork ribs glazed with smoky barbecue sauce.

title: Mango Curry
description: Fragrant coconut curry with ripe mango, chickpeas and fresh coriander.

title: Caesar Salad
description: Crisp romaine lettuce with Caesar dressing, croutons and shaved parmesan.

title: Beef Bourguignon
description: Slow-braised beef in red wine with mushrooms, pearl onions and thyme.

title: Vegetable Stir Fry
description: Crisp seasonal vegetables tossed in a savory ginger and soy sauce.

description: Velvety, rich soup made with lobster, cream, brandy and fresh tarragon.

title: Chicken Quesadilla
description: Grilled flour tortilla filled with seasoned chicken, peppers and melted cheese.

description: Hearty red lentil soup with cumin, turmeric and a squeeze of lemon.

title: Lamb Kebabs
description: Spiced ground lamb skewers grilled over charcoal with tzatziki and flatbread.

title: Eggs Benedict
description: Poached eggs on toasted English muffins with Canadian bacon and hollandaise.

description: Spicy and sour Thai soup with shrimp, lemongrass, galangal and kaffir lime.

title: Poke Bowl
